extracted_claim.claim_summary: The customer claims the laptop keyboard has possible liquid damage from a coffee spill.

image_assessments.notes: The image clearly shows the laptop keyboard, which appears clean and free of any visible liquid damage or stains.

result.user_claim: Customer: I spilled coffee near the laptop and now I am worried. | Support: Which part should be checked? | Customer: Keyboard liquid damage. | Support: Are keys missing or physically broken? | Customer: No, it is about possible liquid damage on the keyboard.
result.evidence_standard_met_reason: At least one image shows the claimed keyboard with sufficient clarity to evaluate the claim.
result.claim_status_justification: The claimed issue (water_damage) is not visible. Images show 'none' instead. Claim is contradicted by visual evidence.
